definition:
1. preparation , ἐν κατασκευῇ τοῦ πολέμου in preparing for  it, (Thucydides); the equipment  of ships, engines, etc., (Thucydides) 
2. any kind of furniture that is fixed , opposite to what is movable  παρασκευή); buildings, fixtures , (Thucydides); but also, like παρασκευή, any furniture , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. the state, condition, constitution  of a thing, (Euripides) 
4. a device, trick , (Aeschines Orator) (ML)
